入手方法: イベント: Bonus Pick - Fire Type Pokemon Mass Outbreak
イベント: Rare Pick - Fire Type Pokemon Mass Outbreak

カードの効果.発動効果: During this turn, attacks used by your Ninetales, Rapidash, or Magmar do +30 damage to your opponent’s Active Pokémon.
カードの効果.追加ルール: You may play only 1 Supporter card during your turn.
